content.en:
On the bright side, the Dark Destruction Domain has sixteen ancestors, and the top three evil clans among the three thousand evil clans each have one ancestor.

In other words, on the bright side, the Dark Destruction Domain has nineteen ancestors.

But there are only ten ancestors in the Dark Sanctuary on the surface, and there is a big gap between them and the ancestors of the Dark Destruction Domain.

Of course, this is all superficial ancestor data, and the real situation, he definitely doesn't understand at this level.

In addition to the Ancestors, there are also more half-step Ancestors and Superior Domain Ancestors of the Dark Destruction Domain, not to mention the Invincible Domain Ancestors, and there are even more of them.

Even the Demon Hell Clan's Invincible Domain Ancestors have hundreds, as well as three Peerless Domain Ancestors, this kind of strength is really very strong, comparable to the strength of a top holy land in the Dark Sacred Domain.

But in fact, there are only seventy-two holy places in the Dark Sacred Domain, and ordinary holy places can't beat the Demon Hell Clan, and the Demon Domain Clan can only rank among the top 100 among the three thousand evil clans.

If it weren't for the Ten Holy Gates, the Dark Habitat would be far from being able to compete with the Dark Destruction Domain.

Overall, the strength of the Dark Sanctuary is not as good as that of the Dark Destruction Domain.

"The strength of the Dark Destruction Domain is so powerful, and there is also a gate of time and space that comes and goes freely, it is no wonder that the Dark Destruction Domain does not dare to take the initiative to invade the Dark Destruction Domain, but the Dark Destruction Domain invades the Dark Destruction Domain every long time!" Ye Tian completely realized.

Of course, it is also true that the Dark Destruction Domain cannot help the Dark Sanctuary.

The key element that really determines the outcome is the level of the Ancestor, if the Dark Sanctuary gives birth to an ancestor who sweeps everything, and easily kills the other ancestors, then the Dark Sanctuary will dare to destroy the Dark Destruction Domain.

The reverse is also true.

Ye Tian sneaked into the Dark Destruction Domain, not only to solve the affairs of the Daoshan Realm, nor to understand the strength of the Dark Destruction Domain, but actually wanted to get some benefits from the Dark Destruction Domain, otherwise he would come to this trip in vain.

The resources of the Dark Destruction Domain are far inferior to the Dark Sacred Domain, this is the source of destruction, and the surrounding area is full of the power of destruction, even if the resources that are born are also full of the power of destruction, which is not suitable for cultivators.

But there are still a lot of opportunities here, even for cultivators.

For example, Ye Tian learned that a chance was not too rebellious for the geniuses of the Dark Destruction Domain, but it was very different for cultivators.

This opportunity is the river of dreams!

The River of Dreams is not a true river, but a holy relic, and it can be called the top ten holy relics in the Dark Destruction Domain.

The Dark Sanctuary has a list of relics, and the Dark Destruction Domain also has a list of relics of destruction, and the River of Dreams is ranked ninth.

It is controlled by one of the three thousand evil clans, the Dream Clan, which is rumored to be the creature born from the Dream River, and eventually rose to become one of the three thousand evil clans, and ranks third among the three thousand evil clans, with an ancestor.

Therefore, even the Destruction Saint Clan will give face to the Dream Clan, and will not rob them of the Dream River.

The River of Dreams is a very special relic, it is not very large from the outside, but once you enter the River of Dreams, it is like coming to an endless river.

The Dream River is a holy relic, it is a whole, so it is impossible to take anything from it, and it is rumored that the Dream Clan is also a kind of creature who strayed into the Dream River and adapted to the environment of the Dream River, and then transformed into the Dream Clan.

In reality, the River of Dreams does not give birth to any living beings.

Of course, just the truth of this history, Ye Tian was too lazy to understand.

But I have to say that the River of Dreams is too magical, the core of the sacred artifact of the River of Dreams gives birth to an area, or a realm of dreams, once you enter the realm of dreams, you can evolve the path of the future according to the path you cultivate, and create a domain ancestor method suitable for your own cultivation.

There was once a genius who destroyed the Holy Clan, and with the help of the River of Dreams, he created a supreme method second only to the Ancestor Method, and finally became the Supreme Domain Ancestor with that Supreme Method, and even fought with the half-step Ancestor without falling behind, which can be called the Invincible Supreme Domain Ancestor.

Don't look at the fact that many domain ancestors have cultivated to the realm of domain ancestors, but when they reach the realm of domain ancestors, they basically don't practice much exercises, and there are no exercises to cultivate.

Because the path of each domain ancestor is different, and the path is fixed, unless it is the ancestor method, the path can be forcibly reversed, otherwise the general domain ancestor practice is of no use to others at all, so how can they cultivate?

However, it is too difficult to create their own domain ancestor method, so many domain ancestors do not directly practice the domain ancestor method, and directly cultivate step by step, relying on resources to improve their cultivation, and the promotion speed is not slow.

Perhaps for many Domain Ancestors, the Domain Ancestor Method is not of much use.

It is true that the ordinary Domain Ancestor Method is indeed useless, but the top-notch Domain Ancestor Method is different.

Once a top-notch Domain Ancestor Method is created, there will be no bottleneck in cultivation and ascension, and more importantly, the Domain Body, Domain Power, and Soul will be more refined.

For example, Ye Tian now, due to the lack of the Domain Ancestor Method, his cultivation has been promoted to the consummation realm of the ordinary domain body, but the speed of refining his own strength is very slow, and it is also difficult to improve to the limit of the ordinary domain ancestor, it takes a long time to slowly improve, and he doesn't even know where his limit is?

However, if he created a top-notch domain ancestor method, he would be able to refine his domain body, domain power, and soul to the limit, and even raise his cultivation to the true limit of his current realm.

However, it was more difficult to create a top-notch Domain Ancestral Method, let alone create a Supreme Domain Ancestral Method.

For many Domain Ancestors, they had the time to create their own Domain Ancestor Method, and they had already relied on resources to raise their cultivation to that level, did they still need the Domain Ancestor Method? Isn't that a waste of time?

However, the River of Dreams can make it easy for the Domain Ancestors to create their own Domain Ancestor Method, as long as the talent is enough, it is no problem to even create a Domain Ancestor Method without a superior level.

However, the Dream Realm could not accommodate many people to create their own domain ancestral methods, and the geniuses of the Dark Destruction Domain wanted to enter the Dream Realm not to create their own domain ancestral methods, but to cultivate domain arts.

However, the Fantasy Realm is not very helpful for cultivating holy techniques, so those Saint Endowments don't think much of the opportunity of the Fantasy Realm.

But Ye Tian needs it, he is a cultivator, if he creates his own Superior Domain Ancestral Method, it will be of great help to him in the future!

The key is that Ye Tian shares information with the soul of the copied body, and copying what the body sees is equivalent to seeing the ontology, and the ontology can also use the Dream Realm to create its own Superior Domain Ancestral Method.

Once he obtained this opportunity, it was no less than a trip to the Holy Golden Realm.
